title: arenaria lanuginosa var. saxosa
intro: Arenaria lanuginosa var. saxosa, also known as woolly sandwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carnation family and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in wound healing, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of woolly sandwort include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote skin health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
